title: wolfhsm: RsaKey::perform uses pub bits field for buffer sizing (unsound)
description: RsaKey::perform allocates its output buffer as self.bits / 8. The bits field is pub, so a caller can set it to the wrong value and silently get a truncated output or a buffer overrun. bits should be private; actual key size should come from key_size_bytes() or be stored at generate time from the server's confirmed value.
